untranslatable_reason: BARR pattern requires detection of multi-phase lead-in structure, trend line construction, and parallel line positioning (warning line, sell line). These geometric pattern elements cannot be expressed using only standard technical indicators from the allowed list. Specifically: (1) 'lead-in height establishment' requires pattern recognition, not available as an indicator; (2) 'breakout from pattern' requires trend line detection; (3) 'warning line' and 'sell line' are manually-drawn parallel support/resistance levels, not computed indicators; (4) 'measure rule' requires geometric pattern measurement. A backtest engine with pattern recognition or line-drawing capabilities would be needed.
translation_notes: Provided a conservative proxy SHORT signal using price crossing below SMA-20 on elevated volume as a breakout approximation, with reversal exit when price crosses back above SMA-20. However, this does NOT capture the true BARR pattern mechanics (lead-in phase, multiple trend lines, parallel construction, measure rule). The Bulkowski BARR pattern is fundamentally a manual chart pattern unsuitable for mechanical rule translation without custom pattern detection.
